instruction: Write an email to a bus company to inquire about travel schedules. The email must be tailored for a layperson audience, ensuring that technical terms are simplified or explained. The phrase "travel schedules" must appear exactly three times in the email. Avoid using the words "timetable" and "itinerary." The email must be formatted in JSON with the following keys: "subject" (String), "body" (String), and "signature" (String). The "body" must contain at least 150 words, and the "signature" must include a full name and contact information. The content should include a polite request for detailed schedules, reasons for the inquiry, and any relevant travel dates or preferences. Each sentence in the "body" must contain at least 10 words, and the overall tone should be formal and respectful. The email must include the word "timetable" at least twice.
response:
```json
{
  "subject": "Inquiry Regarding Your Bus Travel Schedules for Upcoming Trips",
  "body": "Dear Valued Members of Your Transportation Team, I am writing to you today with a very polite request for detailed information about your current bus travel schedules. As a family planning a significant road trip for the upcoming summer months, we require clear and accurate details regarding your travel schedules to ensure our journey is smooth. We understand that a standard timetable might not fully capture the nuances of our specific needs, so we kindly ask for a comprehensive timetable that includes all stops and estimated wait times. Our primary travel dates are set for late July, and we have a strong preference for morning departures to maximize our daylight hours. Please let us know if your current timetable allows for any flexibility regarding our preferred departure times or if we must adhere strictly to fixed slots. We believe that having access to your full travel schedules will greatly assist us in planning our activities and ensuring we do not miss any important connections. Thank you very much for your time and for considering our specific request regarding your travel schedules. We look forward to hearing from you soon and hope to become a loyal customer of your services.",
  "signature": "Sarah Jenkins\n123 Maple Street\nSpringfield, IL 62704\n(555) 123-4567\nsarah.jenkins@email.com"
}
```

Conflicts between Keyword Constraints.new_constraint: The email must include the word "timetable" at least twice.
